tasks.subject: Task 1: localdev.yml format + orchestration phase in command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite library/global/commands/haus-cloneandsetup.md to document the per-repo + workspace localdev.yml schemas and run discover → order → steps → links → env → report.

**Files:** Modify library/global/commands/haus-cloneandsetup.md

**Verify:** grep -c 'localdev.yml' library/global/commands/haus-cloneandsetup.md → ≥ 4

```json:metadata
{"files": ["library/global/commands/haus-cloneandsetup.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'localdev.yml' library/global/commands/haus-cloneandsetup.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both schemas documented", "orchestration phase described", "fallback to heuristics", "links generic + setup-dev-mode deprecated", "env write w/ print fallback, ready-not-running"]}
```
